variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16000 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16000 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16000 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 342.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 174.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 653.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 620.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P524838 Air Cleaner, Disposable | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16000
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P524838 Air Cleaner, Disposable | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16000
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P524838 Air Cleaner, Disposable is designed to provide reliable performance in air cleaner, disposable applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AH1135 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16000
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AH1135 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16000
variants.description: With over 1,500 different air filtration products, from clamps to air housings to advanced air filters, Fleetguard® provides peace of mind for your air filtration needs. Our Fleetguard® AH1135 air housing is part of the heavy-duty air filtration line, covering your sophisticated air intake system requirements.
